name: Crowd Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 bulbs Green onions with tops, sliced
2 cans (4 oz each) Chopped green chilies
1 5 3/4 oz can Pitted ripe olives, drained and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Add 2 cups of shredded cheddar cheese to the mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, mix mayonnaise and sour cream.
4. Pour the mayonnaise and sour cream mixture into the chicken mixture and toss until well combined.
5. Spoon the mixture evenly into two greased 13x9x1-inch baking dishes.
6. Sprinkle crushed potato chips on top of each dish.
7. Add the remaining shredded cheddar cheese to the top of each casserole.
8. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-25 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
Serves: 24
